section.heading: Clean watersheds needs survey

subsection.heading: Requirement
subsection.chapeau: Not later than 2 years after November 15, 2021, and not less frequently than once every 4 years thereafter, the Administrator shall—

paragraph.content: conduct and complete an assessment of capital improvement needs for all projects that are eligible under section 1383(c) of this title for assistance from State water pollution control revolving funds; and
submit to Congress a report describing the results of the assessment completed under paragraph (1).

content.p: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out the initial needs survey under subsection (a) $5,000,000, to remain available until expended.

section.sourceCredit: (June 30, 1948, ch. 758, title VI, § 609, as added Pub. L. 117–58, div. E, title II, § 50220, Nov. 15, 2021, 135 Stat. 1180.)
